rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; US attention remains split between Iran deal and Ukraine support — no qualitative change but persistent high-stakes environment.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues with no ceasefire or qualitative shift; daily life in Ukraine remains defined by air strikes, mobilization, and infrastructure risk.

top_events.title: Trump says Iran deal still close despite Beirut strikes
top_events.summary: US diplomatic focus on Iran deal risks diverting attention and resources from Ukraine support; continued uncertainty about Western commitment is a concern for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU formally advancing membership talks is a slow-moving positive signal for Ukraine's long-term future, though it has no immediate impact on the war.
